panels.description: Select active plan in Flow Finance Planning UI

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(p.name || ' v' || v.version_number, 'No active plan') AS value FROM plans p JOIN plan_versions v ON v.plan_id = p.id AND v.is_latest = true WHERE p.is_active = true LIMIT 1

panels.title: Active plan

targets.rawSql: SELECT pdc.ts AS time, pdc.planned_net::float AS value FROM plan_daily_cashflow pdc JOIN plan_versions v ON v.id = pdc.version_id JOIN plans p ON p.id = v.plan_id WHERE p.is_active = true AND v.is_latest = true AND pdc.computation_id = (SELECT pc.id FROM plan_computations pc WHERE pc.version_id = v.id AND pc.status = 'success' ORDER BY pc.computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(pdc.ts) ORDER BY 1

SELECT (t.date::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS time, SUM(t.amount::float) AS value FROM transactions t JOIN accounts a ON a.firefly_id = t.account_id WHERE a.type = 'asset' AND COALESCE(t.payload->'attributes'->>'type', '') != 'transfer' AND ('${category}' = '' OR t.category_id = '${category}') AND $__timeFilter(t.date::timestamp) GROUP BY t.date ORDER BY 1

WITH planned AS (SELECT pdc.ts::date AS day, pdc.planned_net::float AS planned FROM plan_daily_cashflow pdc JOIN plan_versions v ON v.id = pdc.version_id JOIN plans p ON p.id = v.plan_id WHERE p.is_active = true AND v.is_latest = true AND pdc.computation_id = (SELECT pc.id FROM plan_computations pc WHERE pc.version_id = v.id AND pc.status = 'success' ORDER BY pc.computed_at DESC LIMIT 1)), actual AS (SELECT t.date AS day, SUM(t.amount::float) AS actual FROM transactions t JOIN accounts a ON a.firefly_id = t.account_id WHERE a.type = 'asset' AND COALESCE(t.payload->'attributes'->>'type', '') != 'transfer' AND ('${category}' = '' OR t.category_id = '${category}') GROUP BY t.date) SELECT COALESCE(a.day, p.day)::timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS time, COALESCE(a.actual, 0) - COALESCE(p.planned, 0) AS value FROM actual a FULL OUTER JOIN planned p ON a.day = p.day WHERE $__timeFilter(COALESCE(a.day, p.day)::timestamp) ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Month-to-date planned sums elapsed plan days only (capped at CURRENT_DATE). When the active plan horizon starts after month start, planned MTD reflects elapsed days only — not the full plan horizon.

targets.rawSql: WITH planned AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pdc.planned_net), 0)::numeric AS total FROM plan_daily_cashflow pdc JOIN plan_versions v ON v.id = pdc.version_id JOIN plans p ON p.id = v.plan_id WHERE p.is_active = true AND v.is_latest = true AND pdc.computation_id = (SELECT pc.id FROM plan_computations pc WHERE pc.version_id = v.id AND pc.status = 'success' ORDER BY pc.computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND pdc.ts >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND pdc.ts::date <= CURRENT_DATE), actual AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0)::numeric AS total FROM transactions t JOIN accounts a ON a.firefly_id = t.account_id WHERE a.type = 'asset' AND COALESCE(t.payload->'attributes'->>'type', '') != 'transfer' AND ('${category}' = '' OR t.category_id = '${category}') AND t.date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date) SELECT 'Planned MTD' AS metric, (SELECT total FROM planned) AS amount UNION ALL SELECT 'Actual MTD', (SELECT total FROM actual) UNION ALL SELECT 'Deviation MTD', (SELECT total FROM actual) - (SELECT total FROM planned)

panels.title: MTD summary

list.definition: SELECT v.id::text FROM plan_versions v JOIN plans p ON p.id = v.plan_id WHERE p.is_active = true AND v.is_latest = true LIMIT 1
list.label: Active plan version
list.name: active_plan_version
list.query: SELECT v.id::text FROM plan_versions v JOIN plans p ON p.id = v.plan_id WHERE p.is_active = true AND v.is_latest = true LIMIT 1

list.name: category
list.query: SELECT '' AS __value, 'All categories' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT c.firefly_id AS __value, COALESCE(c.name, c.firefly_id) AS __text FROM categories c ORDER BY 2
